name: Yotam Perkal
bio: Yotam Perkal is the Director of Security Research at Pluto Security. His work examines how real-world attackers adapt to new AI-driven development and automation ecosystems, with an emphasis on practitioner-grounded research and ecosystem-level security patterns. Yotam is an active participant in several cross-industry working groups dealing with AI security, vulnerability management, and supply chain security.
